creator: ulli@camelot.de
text:
Makefile of /usr/ports/net/samba refers to nonexistent distfile.
	On ftp.freebsd.org, the latest Version is patchlevel 4, on 
	samba.anu.edu.au it is patchlevel 7, whereas the FreeBSD port-
	Makefile refers to patchlevel 6.

Fix: 

copy the right file to the right location on ftp.freebsd.org,
	or update the port.
	On samba.anu.edu.au, the required file samba-1.9.18p6.tar.gz
	can be found in /pub/samba/old-versions/
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/net/samba; make
